label: 197_romania_mugur isrescu_isrescu_mugur
description: Governor Mugur Isărescu discusses Romania’s progress towards adopting the euro, focusing on economic convergence and the impact of monetary policy. He addresses post-crisis performance and future prospects for integration into the European Union.
